<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Console\CommandLoader; use Symfony\Component\Console\Command\Command; use Symfony\Component\Console\Exception\CommandNotFoundException; /** * @author Robin Chalas <robin.chalas@gmail.com> */ interface CommandLoaderInterface { /** * Loads a command. * * @throws CommandNotFoundException */ public function get(string $name): Command; /** * Checks if a command exists. */ public function has(string $name): bool; /** * @return string[] */ public function getNames(): array; }
